channel.title: Infrastructure on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: GraphQL API resource limits
item.description:
GitHub is introducing new resource consumption limits to its GraphQL API to maintain infrastructure stability and dependability.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: Policy as code, explained
item.description:
Policy as code automates the verification of compliance with IT and business requirements during infrastructure deployments, providing rapid checks within minutes or seconds.

  • Source: Terraform
